results.title: CM Maryam sets June 30 deadline for completion of sewerage, drainage projects
results.description: LAHORE - Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif has set June 30 as the deadline for completion of all sewerage and drainage projects across the province and imposed a ban on leaving excavation work incomplete or roads open after digging.

results.title: Cryptocurrency News: Pepeto Crosses $10.2M as Iran Deal Collapses and Solana Tests $68 Support
results.description: The cryptocurrency news cycle heading into the weekend is all risk and no relief. The Iran peace signing collapsed after Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon, wiping the only macro tailwind left after the Fed's hawkish dot plot earlier in the week,
